hero.subtitle: Professional cleaning services for homes and businesses. Skilled, insured and reliable team — from Rehovot to Hadera.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive cleaning solutions for every need — at the highest standard

residential.title: Apartment & Home Cleaning
residential.desc: Thorough and comprehensive cleaning for private homes and apartments. Including polishing, windows, bathroom and kitchen sanitizing.

renovation.title: Post-Renovation Cleaning
renovation.desc: Removal of paint residues, grout and construction dust. We'll turn your building site into a clean home ready to move in.

office.title: Office & Business Cleaning
office.desc: Regular maintenance and thorough cleaning for offices and businesses. A clean work environment that boosts productivity.

whyus.label: Why Clean+
whyus.heading: All Inclusive. One Transparent Price.
whyus.subtitle: Professional team, equipment included, flexible scheduling — everything you need for a perfect home.
whyus.f1_desc: Every employee has undergone comprehensive professional training. We never send anyone to your home unprepared.
whyus.f2_desc: We bring all equipment and supplies. You don't need to worry about anything.
whyus.f3_desc: We work on weekends and holidays too — at hours that suit you.
whyus.f4_desc: A fixed price agreed before work begins. No surprise additions.
whyus.f5_desc: Long-term arrangement? The same people will come — they know your home and preferences.
whyus.f6_desc: Our team is divided by area — ensuring on-time arrival and maximum efficiency.

guarantee.desc: Not satisfied with the cleaning? We'll come back and fix it for free. Still not happy? Full refund. No questions, no hassle.

how.title: How It Works
how.heading: 3 Simple Steps
how.step1_desc: Fill out the short form or call us directly.
how.step2_title: We Call Back Within an Hour
how.step2_desc: We'll tailor the service to your needs and offer a fair price.
how.step3_title: We Come and Get the Job Done
how.step3_desc: Our skilled team will arrive and make the place shine to your satisfaction.
how.note: No commitment · We call back within an hour

testimonials.title: Client Reviews
testimonials.t1_text: Simply excellent service! The team arrived on time, worked thoroughly and professionally. The apartment looks brand new.
testimonials.t2_text: We've been working with them for a year for office cleaning. Always on time, thorough work, completely fair price.
testimonials.t3_text: I ordered cleaning before moving apartments. The team didn't leave until everything was perfect. Highly recommend!
